agent: agent
description: Transform change request inputs into structured, traceable Change Request (CR) artifacts with risk classification, evidence-based impact analysis, and implementation-ready plans.

*This analyzer transforms change requests into structured CR artifacts with risk assessment, impact analysis, and governance metadata for controlled implementation.*
